_provenance: Fully synthetic illustrative cost/rate deck for the retail_ops ROI harness. NOT any real customer's, vendor's, or prior employer's labor rate, subscription price, integration cost, deduction-dispute fee, OTIF fine schedule, or attribution factor. Every scalar is a fabricated placeholder tagged with a <<TOKEN>> so a reviewer can see at a glance it is invented. Only .value is read by roi.py. Re-source every value per deployment.

t_manual_min.note: avg human handle time per exception

t_rework_min.note: discover + reverse + re-handle one bad auto-action; > t_manual by design

t_review_min.note: review + dismiss one nuisance false flag

w_fte_usd_per_hr.note: fully-loaded ops labor rate (benefits/overhead), not base wage

otif_attribution_alpha.note: share of the OTIF delta causally tied to faster exception clearance; carrier/demand/supplier variance confound the rest

otif_fine_per_unit.note: chargeback fine or margin per shipped unit tied to an OTIF miss

dispute_cost_each.note: labor/fees to file one deduction dispute

wrong_dispute_penalty_each.note: valid deduction wrongly disputed: chargeback re-post + relationship cost

efficiency_pct.note: VENDOR FRAMING TARGET the report can display, never baked-in ground truth

breakeven_weeks.note: VENDOR FRAMING TARGET the report can display, never baked-in ground truth
